item.description:
What's new

  • Renamed to Tabnook (formerly SafariIcons). New bundle id com.franvy.Tabnook and repo at github.com/Franvy/Tabnook.
  • Sparkle auto-update: "Check for Updates…" menu item and automatic background checks. All updates are EdDSA-signed.
  • Icon backup & auto-restore: custom icons are mirrored to a backup folder and automatically restored if Safari purges its Touch Icons cache.
  • Settings → Backup Folder: point the backup at iCloud Drive or Dropbox to sync custom icons across Macs.
  • Toast feedback for reconcile and settings changes.

Upgrading from v1.1.0 (SafariIcons)? Because the bundle id changed, macOS treats this as a new app — delete the old SafariIcons.app first, then install Tabnook. Future updates (v1.2.0 → newer) install automatically.
